title: Maya DISCONTINUED
description: Let maya carry items for you! she will follow you everywhere :)
body:
**Long description:**

**Meet Maya, your new adventure companion! This mod introduces a charming character who can carry items for you, making your exploration and battles more manageable. With her help, you can streamline your inventory and focus on what truly matters: the journey ahead!**

**Features:**

**Item Carrying: Maya can hold a variety of items, freeing up your inventory space for essentials. No more worrying about clutter!**

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c63093fb18e3cc9baab2075b340a865a7bdc50fc.png)

![maya](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/664a5139ca50cc3dd12b42bcf242d527b57e71eb.png)

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c63093fb18e3cc9baab2075b340a865a7bdc50fc.png)

**Note:**

1 - If she dies all items will be dropped.

2 - The mod fully works with: Physics Mod.

3 - Works with Optifine: Unknown.

4 - Maya sees you from 600 blocks away.

5 - Maya always stays close to you

![line](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c63093fb18e3cc9baab2075b340a865a7bdc50fc.png)

**Credits:**
Special thanks to [My girlfriend @Mei_Xiao_Gong] ( Main creator )



![intelij](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/343a4cdc7be7fa26dfd02e5d47dfbffa99016f2f.png)

**This mod is created with: intellij**
